title: dryopteris fragrans
intro: Dryopteris fragrans, also known as the scaly male-fern or autumn fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, which is a type of fern native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to treat conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Dryopteris fragrans include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Dryopteris fragrans can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
